item.title: Google Cloud
item.summary: Google 面向企业的云与 AI 经营单元。

updates.event: 蓝图指出传统 SBOM 无法覆盖数据集等 AI 资产。
updates.after: "traditional SBOM cannot cover AI-specific assets like datasets and ML frameworks"

metrics.statement: 二季度谷歌云收入同比增长82%

evidence.source_quote: 二季度谷歌云实现收入 247.7 亿美元，同比增长 82%

metrics.statement: 截至2026年第二季度末，谷歌云订单积压达5140亿美元，环比增加超过500亿美元，预计其中一半以上订单将在未来24个月转化为收入。

evidence.source_quote: 截至季度末，谷歌云订单积压达到5140亿美元（约合人民币3.48万亿元），环比增加超过500亿美元（约合人民币3385.0亿元），预计其中一半以上订单将在未来24个月转化为收入

metrics.statement: 谷歌云二季度实现收入247.7亿美元，同比增长82%

evidence.source_quote: 二季度谷歌云实现收入 247.7 亿美元，同比增长 82%

metrics.statement: Q2 Google Cloud 业务利润率提升至 36%，超出市场预期

evidence.source_quote: 云业务利润率则进一步提高至36%，超出市场预期

metrics.statement: 谷歌云2026年第二季度运营利润88.14亿美元，约为去年同期的3.1倍，运营利润率由20.7%升至35.6%。

evidence.source_quote: 谷歌云运营利润达到88.14亿美元（约合人民币596.7亿元），约为去年同期的3.1倍，运营利润率由20.7%跃升至35.6%

metrics.statement: 未来5年Google Cloud将向Anthropic提供5吉瓦规模的算力

evidence.source_quote: 未来 5 年 Google Cloud 将向其提供 5 吉瓦规模的算力。

metricSummary.selection_policy: 只展示可跨期比较、会影响经营或战略位置的主指标。

facts.subject: model_armor_capability
facts.statement: Model Armor 在应用层检查 Prompt 和模型响应，识别 Prompt Injection 攻击、敏感数据泄露与有害内容。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Model Armor 会检查 Prompt 和模型响应，识别 Prompt Injection 攻击、敏感数据泄露以及有害内容

facts.subject: gemini_api_throughput
facts.statement: Gemini等谷歌自研模型API处理速率约每分钟220亿个Token，环比增长37.5%

evidence_cards.source_quote: Gemini等谷歌自研模型API处理速率约为每分钟220亿个Token，环比增长37.5%

facts.subject: fortune_100_gemini_adoption
facts.statement: 接近90%的《财富》100强企业使用Gemini Enterprise

evidence_cards.source_quote: 目前已有接近90%的《财富》100强企业使用Gemini Enterprise

facts.subject: cost_reduction_data_platform
facts.statement: Checkout.com将Airflow编排迁移至Google Cloud托管服务后,月度数据平台成本下降约30%。

evidence_cards.source_quote: the payments firm cut monthly data platform costs by about 30%

facts.subject: end_user_group
facts.statement: End users of the AI compute credits are federal laboratory researchers.

evidence_cards.source_quote: giving federal laboratory researchers access to Gemini and other AI models

facts.subject: gemini_token_throughput
facts.statement: Gemini模型每分钟处理2200亿个API Token（注：原文表述为220亿个/分钟，疑似数量级笔误）

evidence_cards.source_quote: Gemini模型每分钟处理220亿个API Token

facts.subject: capex_guidance_2026
facts.statement: 2026年资本开支指引上修至1950亿至2050亿美元区间

evidence_cards.source_quote: 公司将 2026 年资本开支指引由 1800 亿至 1900 亿美元区间上修至 1950 亿至 2050 亿美元区间

facts.subject: ai_infra_funding_raise
facts.statement: Google于6月通过股票发行和债券融资筹集近700亿美元用于AI基础设施

evidence_cards.source_quote: 6 月还通过股票发行和债券融资筹集近 700 亿美元用于 AI 基础设施

facts.subject: frozen_v2_earliest_deployment
facts.statement: Frozen v2 chip earliest possible deployment year is 2028

evidence_cards.source_quote: 这款芯片最早可能在2028年部署。

facts.subject: tpu_revenue_recognition
facts.statement: Alphabet 在 2026Q2 首次确认 TPU 销售收入，首次向客户数据中心交付 TPU 硬件系统

evidence_cards.source_quote: Alphabet 在 Q2 首度认列 TPU 销售收入：其在该季度首次向客户数据中心交付 TPU 硬件系统

facts.subject: third_party_data_center_strategy
facts.statement: Alphabet 将在本季度扩大对第三方数据中心容量的使用规模作为自建上线前的过渡补充，并会影响 Google Cloud 运营利润率

evidence_cards.source_quote: 其将在本季度扩大对第三方数据中心容量的使用规模，作为自建设施上线前时的过渡与补充，这会影响到 Google Cloud 的运营利润率

facts.statement: 二季度搜索及其他业务收入同比增长17%

evidence_cards.source_quote: 搜索及其他业务收入同比增长 17%

facts.subject: backlog_growth_rate
facts.statement: Google Cloud backlog jumped 390% (as referenced in the headline figure).

evidence_cards.source_quote: Google Cloud Q2 Revenue Soars 82%, Backlog Jumps 390%

facts.subject: revenue_yoy_growth_q2
facts.statement: 谷歌云二季度营收同比增长82%

evidence_cards.source_quote: Google Cloud Q2 Revenue Soars 82%

facts.subject: revenue_qoq_increase
facts.statement: 谷歌云二季度营收环比增加48亿美元

evidence_cards.source_quote: 谷歌云营收环比增加48亿美元

facts.subject: ai_competitive_position
facts.statement: Raymond James analyst Josh Beck stated in a report the week of publication that Gemini 3.5 Pro's delay has shifted external perception of Google from leader to follower in AI.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Gemini 3.5 Pro 推迟发布，已经让外界对谷歌的印象从领跑者变成追赶者

facts.subject: gke_ai_security_deployment_phases
facts.statement: 蓝图建议分三阶段部署安全能力：Deploy（部署）、Operate（运营）、Govern（治理）。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 蓝图将其划分为三个阶段：Deploy（部署）、Operate（运营）和 Govern（治理）

facts.subject: revenue_benchmark_vs_competitors
facts.statement: Google Cloud's Q2 sequential revenue increase is positioned as a new benchmark for Microsoft Cloud and AWS ahead of their upcoming earnings reports.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Google Cloud's $4.8 billion sequential revenue increase establishes a new benchmark for Microsoft Cloud and AWS as investors prepare for their upcoming earnings reports.

facts.subject: ai_business_win_rate_vs_microsoft_aws
facts.statement: Google Cloud is winning new AI business and accelerating faster than Microsoft Cloud and AWS.

evidence_cards.source_quote: winning new AI business and accelerating faster than Microsoft Cloud and AWS

facts.subject: ai_business_competitive_outcome
facts.statement: Google Cloud is winning new AI business and accelerating faster than Microsoft Cloud and AWS.

evidence_cards.source_quote: winning new AI business and accelerating faster than Microsoft Cloud and AWS

facts.subject: ai_investment_thesis
facts.statement: Alphabet 将人工智能领域的持续投入作为推动业务增长的关键驱动力。

evidence_cards.source_quote: as artificial intelligence (AI) investments continued to fuel growth

facts.subject: gke_sbom_limitation_positioning
facts.statement: 蓝图指出传统 SBOM 无法覆盖数据集等 AI 资产。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 传统的软件物料清单（SBOM）无法覆盖 AI 特有的资产，例如数据集和机器学习框架

facts.subject: voicify_relationship
facts.statement: Voicify is a customer of Google Cloud using its Gemini models.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Voicify cuts costs with Google Cloud's Gemini models

facts.subject: managed_service_customer
facts.statement: Google Cloud provides a managed Airflow orchestration service used by Checkout.com.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Google Cloud's managed service

facts.subject: scientific_discovery_pace_target
facts.statement: The Genesis Mission partnership aims to double the pace of scientific discovery within a decade.

evidence_cards.source_quote: aiming to double the pace of scientific discovery within a decade

facts.subject: anthropic_google_cloud_commitment
facts.statement: Anthropic承诺未来5年向谷歌云支出2000亿美元，作为芯片和云服务协议的一部分

evidence_cards.source_quote: 在 2026 年 5 月，Anthropic 承诺未来 5 年内向谷歌云支出 2000 亿美元，作为其芯片和云服务协议的一部分。

facts.subject: sap_google_cloud_ai_marketing_partnership
facts.statement: On April 22, 2026, SAP and Google Cloud announced a new partnership aimed at helping marketers leverage AI (article excerpt truncated).

evidence_cards.source_quote: On April 22, SAP and Google Cloud announced a new partnership that will help marketers put AI age
